stories.title: Road ke 3 Rules jo tu roz todta hai
stories.description: Double Yellow Line, Zebra Crossing aur Speed Breaker Stripes — tu roz dekhta hai par kabhi samjha nahi. Aaj yeh teen tujhe expose karenge.
stories.tags: road safety, hidden meaning, traffic rules india, driving mistakes, viral india

modules.video_generation_prompt: मैं डबल पीली रेखा — ओवरटेक पूरी तरह प्रतिबंधित भारत नियम में, दोहरी लाइन मतलब दोनों दिशाओं से पार करना गैरकानूनी, सौ मीटर विजिबिलिटी कम होने पर लगती हूं, तू फिर भी काटता गधे दो हजार चालान भर।
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of a furious Double Yellow Line character in its true painted road marking form with bright dual yellow stripes, cartoon angry scrunched eyes, tiny nose, two small hands — one hand jabbing directly at camera, the other pointing at a car attempting to overtake across it — and two stubby legs planted wide on rough asphalt. Full body visible. Mouth wide open screaming. Leaning aggressively forward toward viewer. Scene is a real Indian highway with fast moving cars, dusty air, visible lane markings stretching into distance, roadside trees and dividers present. Harsh midday sunlight casting sharp shadows, dominant colors yellow, grey and warm brown tones. Camera low-angle up-shot from road surface making character look dominant. Mood is furious and betrayed, viewer feels exposed for breaking rules daily without understanding consequences.

modules.video_generation_prompt: मैं ज़ेब्रा क्रॉसिंग — पैदल यात्री को पहले पार करने का कानूनी अधिकार, मोटर वाहन अधिनियम धारा एक सौ बत्तीस रुकना अनिवार्य, मैं रोज सामने था, तू फिर भी चढ़ता साले पांच सौ जुर्माना।
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of a furious Zebra Crossing character in its true white striped road marking form, cartoon angry scrunched eyes, tiny nose, two small hands — one hand jabbing directly at camera, the other pointing at pedestrians waiting beside it — and two stubby legs planted wide on urban asphalt. Full body visible. Mouth wide open screaming. Leaning aggressively forward toward viewer. Scene is a real Indian city road near a traffic signal with pedestrians, bikes, cars crowding, shops and trees visible, traffic halted nearby. Early evening lighting with warm streetlights beginning to glow, dominant colors white stripes, grey road, amber lights. Camera eye-level confrontation angle placing viewer on road. Mood is furious and betrayed, character feels ignored despite daily presence, viewer feels guilty and directly called out.

modules.video_generation_prompt: मैं स्पीड ब्रेकर पट्टियां — तीस किलोमीटर प्रति घंटा से ऊपर झटका नुकसान करता सस्पेंशन, मानक ऊंचाई दस सेंटीमीटर तय है सड़क विभाग द्वारा, तू फिर भी उड़ाता चुतिया पांच हजार मरम्मत भर।
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of a furious Speed Breaker Stripes character in its true white painted striped bumps form across road, extreme close-up showing texture, cartoon angry scrunched eyes, tiny nose, two small hands — one jabbing directly at camera, other flailing — two stubby legs barely visible planted wide. Full body visible despite close framing. Mouth wide open screaming intensely. Leaning aggressively forward toward viewer. Scene is a residential Indian street with visible speed breaker hump, nearby houses, parked bikes, narrow lane details. Night setting with streetlight glow casting yellow highlights, dominant colors white stripes, dark asphalt, warm yellow light. Camera extreme close-up smash push-in creating meme frame intensity. Mood is peak fury, viewer feels attacked for reckless driving and ignoring obvious warning.

modules.video_generation_prompt: याद रख — ओवरटेक डबल लाइन पर मना, पैदल को पहले हक, स्पीड ब्रेकर धीमे पार। अगर हमसे कोई ज्ञान मिला तो ठोक दे लाइक बटन और फॉलो कर ले।
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of three furious road characters Double Yellow Line, Zebra Crossing and Speed Breaker Stripes together, each in true physical painted forms with cartoon angry scrunched eyes, tiny noses, two small hands each — all jabbing toward camera — and stubby legs planted wide across road surface. Full bodies visible. Mouths open screaming in unison. Leaning aggressively forward. Scene is a busy Indian intersection combining highway, pedestrian crossing and residential road elements blended, vehicles, people and buildings visible. Evening lighting with mixed headlights and streetlights, dominant colors yellow, white and asphalt grey. Camera wide eye-level confrontation capturing all three equally. Mood is overwhelming confrontation, viewer feels surrounded and guilty for ignoring all rules daily.
